Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start loadwwpContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &PblTipo1 = nullvalue(&PblTipo1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &PblTipo2 = nullvalue(&PblTipo2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &PblTipo3 = nullvalue(&PblTipo3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PblSts = nullvalue(&PblSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Problema Solucao' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPROBLEMASOLUCAO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaAutorizacao.Call('DELEGARRESPONSAVEL', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &DELEGARRESPONSAVEL) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('FINALIZARPROBLEMA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &FINALIZARPROBLEMA) if &AutNiv > 2 &VenCod = 0 else &VenCod = &Context.pesCod EndIF EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = ProblemaSolucao.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, PblCod) &Actiongri.Clear() &Actiongri.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If ((PblSts = Status_Problema.Pendente or PblSts = Status_Problema.Solucionando) and &DELEGARRESPONSAVEL > 0) &Actiongri.AddItem(1, 'Delegar Responsável') Endif If (PblSts = Status_Problema.Solucionando) &Actiongri.AddItem(2, 'Problema Solucionado') Endif If ((PblSts = Status_Problema.Solucionado or PblSts = Status_Problema.Cancelado or PblSts = Status_Problema.Finalizado) and &AutNiv > 2) &Actiongri.AddItem(3, 'Abrir Lançamento') Endif If ((PblSts <> Status_problema.Cancelado and PblSts <> Status_Problema.Finalizado) and &FINALIZARPROBLEMA > 0) &Actiongri.AddItem(4, 'Finalizar Problema') Endif If ((PblSts <> Status_Problema.Cancelado and PblSts <> Status_Problema.Finalizado) and &AutNiv > 2) &Actiongri.AddItem(5, 'Cancelar') Endif &Actiongri.AddItem(6, 'Observações/Anexo') &Actiongri.AddItem(7, 'Log.Alteração') &dias = iif(not PblDtaFin.IsEmpty(),PblDtaFin - PblDta,ServerDate() - PblDta) &gridPblUsrResNom = substr(PblUsrResNom, 1, 12)+'.' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ ValidaPedidoProblema.call(EmpCod,PblFilCod,PblPedCod, &PesRaz, &PedVlrLiq, &Mensagem) &dias.ColumnClass = iif(&dias > 1,!'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnRed WWColumnRedSingleCell',!'WWColumn hidden-xs') Do Case Case PblSts = Status_Problema.Pendente PblSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnRed WWColumnRedSingleCell' Case PblSts = Status_Problema.Solucionando PblSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnOrange WWColumnOrangeSingleCell' Case PblSts = Status_Problema.Solucionado PblSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnBlue WWColumnBlueSingleCell' Otherwise PblSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Actiongri.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &Actiongri = 1 Do 'Do Agendar' Case &Actiongri = 2 Do 'Do Finalizar' Case &Actiongri = 3 Do 'Do AbrirLancamento' Case &Actiongri = 4 Do 'Do FinalizarProblema' Case &Actiongri = 5 Do 'Do CancelarLancamento' Case &Actiongri = 6 Do 'Do Observacoes' Case &Actiongri = 7 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' EndCase &Actiongri = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event LogAlteracao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wwLogRegistrosIndividual.Create(&LogErpRegKey, 'PROBLEMASOLUCAO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ProblemaSolucao.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(PblCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWProblemaSolucao.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWProblemaSolucao.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PblUsrResNom1.Visible = False &PblTipo1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' &PblUsrResNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PBLTIPO' &PblTipo1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PblUsrResNom2.Visible = False &PblTipo2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' &PblUsrResNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PBLTIPO' &PblTipo2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PblUsrResNom3.Visible = False &PblTipo3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' &PblUsrResNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PBLTIPO' &PblTipo3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' &PblUsrResNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' &PblUsrResNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Agendar' if &DELEGARRESPONSAVEL > 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPAgendarProblema.PopUp(EmpCod, PblCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIf EndSub Sub 'Do Finalizar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPFinalizaProblema.PopUp(EmpCod, PblCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirLancamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpAbrirLancamento.PopUp(EmpCod, PblCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FinalizarProblema' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpFinalizarlancamentoProblema.PopUp(EmpCod, PblCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarLancamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpCancelaProblema.PopUp(EmpCod, PblCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Observacoes' wpProblemaObservacao.Popup(EmpCod, PblCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' &LogErpRegKey = trim(str(PblCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LogAlteracao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' if &AutNiv > 2 &VenCod = 0 else &VenCod = &Context.pesCod EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PBLPEDCOD" &PblPedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PBLSTS" &PblSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PBLDTA" &PblDta.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PblDta_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"VENCOD" &VenCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ if &AutNiv > 2 &VenCod = 0 else &VenCod = &Context.pesCod EndIF EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' &PblUsrResNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PBLTIPO' &PblTipo1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PBLPEDCOD", "", not &PblPedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PblPedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PBLSTS", "", not &PblSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PblSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PBLDTA", "", not (&PblDta.IsEmpty() AND &PblDta_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PblDta.ToString().Trim(), &PblDta_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"VENCOD", "", not &VenCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &VenCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' AND not &PblUsrResNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PblUsrResNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PBLTIPO' AND not &PblTipo1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PblTipo1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' AND not &PblUsrResNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PblUsrResNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PBLTIPO' AND not &PblTipo2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PblTipo2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PBLUSRRESNOM' AND not &PblUsrResNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PblUsrResNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PBLTIPO' AND not &PblTipo3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PblTipo3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"ProblemaSolucao" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
